name: Sweet n' Spicy Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a large resealable plastic bag; add taco seasoning and toss to coat.
2. In a skillet, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the chicken pieces and brown until no longer pink.
3. Combine the salsa and peach preserves in a bowl.
4. Stir the mixture into the skillet with the chicken.
5. Bring the sauce to a boil, then reduce the heat and cover.
6. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until the meat juices run clear.
7. Serve over rice.
